title: Hiceeden Set of 9 Plastic Tumblers Drinking Glasses, 280ML/ 10 OZ Unbreakable Clear Water Cups, Reusable Drinking Cups Wine Glasses for Juice, Beverages, Drinks, BPA Free, Stackable, Dishwasher Safe
features: MODERATE SIZE - The capacity of Hiceeden plastic tumblers is 280ml/9.5oz. The overall size is about 3.5"L * 3.5"W * 3.5H. It is very suitable for daily use or commercial use. The temperature resistance range is - 4 ℉~ 248 ℉. It can be safely put into the refrigerator and dishwasher.

UNBREAKABLE MATERIAL - Made of food-grade PC material, odor-free, lead-free, and BPA-free. The edge and bottom are thickened, wear-resistant and fall-resistant. It is stronger than acrylic and glass cups. So it can be used for a long time without changing new cups constantly.

TRANSPARENT and SMOOTH - Our drinking cups has a glass-like texture and is transparent as crystal, which is convenient to observe whether there are impurities in the liquid. The cup body is smooth and light, so it is comfortable to hold without scratching your tongue.

BEAUTIFUL and SAVING SPACE - The stackable design makes the drinking glasses not occupy too much storage space in your home. The unique circle texture of the cup is natural and beautiful. When the glass is filled with water, it becomes more sparkling and crystal-clear.

WIDE APPLICATION - These water cups can be used to hold warm water, juice, wine, milk tea and other drinks. It is very suitable for families with children and pets, or for parties with large numbers of people. It can be used as a bar or restaurant item, or as a birthday or holiday gift for others.
